zh.lifeSummary: 當Francis Alexander Hughes Sr於大約1697年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞費拉德爾福亞時，他的父親Charles Hughes34歲，母親Electa Rebecca Judson23歲。他於大約1729年與Christina Nilsdötter Jonasson在美國賓夕法尼亞州結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1745年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州奧古斯塔。他去世於1779年7月26日在美國維吉尼亞州哈普爾奧古斯塔享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Francis Alexander Hughes Sr于大约1697年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞費拉德爾福亞时，他的父亲Charles Hughes34岁，母亲Electa Rebecca Judson23岁。他于大约1729年与Christina Nilsdötter Jonasson在美国宾夕法尼亚州结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1745年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州奧古斯塔。他去世于1779年7月26日在美国弗吉尼亚州哈普爾奧古斯塔享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

historicEvents.title: Mount Vernon
historicEvents.description: Mount Vernon Plantation was the home of George Washington. It started off as 2,000 acres and was later expanded to 8,000 acres. The house itself started off as a six room building then got extended to twenty-one rooms.
"Patrick Henry made his ""Give me Liberty or Give me Death"" speech in Richmond Virginia."
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

en.lifeSummary: When Francis Alexander Hughes Sr was born about 1697, in Philadelphia, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, his father, Charles Hughes, was 34 and his mother, Electa Rebecca Judson, was 23. He married Christina Nilsdötter Jonasson about 1729, in Pennsylvania, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Augusta, Virginia, British Colonial America in 1745. He died on 26 July 1779, in Augusta, Hampshire, Virginia, United States, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Francis Alexander Hughes Sr est né environ 1697, à Philadelphie, Philadelphia, Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Charles Hughes, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Electa Rebecca Judson, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Christina Nilsdötter Jonasson environ 1729, à Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Augusta, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1745. Il est décédé le 26 juillet 1779, à Augusta, Hampshire, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 83 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Alexander Hughes Sr è nato il circa 1697 nel Filadelfia, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Charles Hughes, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Electa Rebecca Judson, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Christina Nilsdötter Jonasson circa 1729, nel Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Augusta, Virginia, British Colonial America nel 1745. Morì il 26 luglio 1779, nel Augusta, Hampshire, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Francis Alexander Hughes Srが約1697年にイギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州フィラデルフィアフィラデルフィアで生まれた時，父Charles Hughesは34歳，母Electa Rebecca Judsonは23歳であった。約1729年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州でChristina Nilsdötter Jonassonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1745年にはイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州アウグスタに住んでいた。彼は1779年7月26日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ハンプシュアイアアウグスタで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Francis Alexander Hughes Sr(이)가 대략 1697년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아 필라들필아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Charles Hughes(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Electa Rebecca Judson(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1729년 미국 펜실베이니아 주에서 Christina Nilsdötter Jonasson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1745년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 오구스타에서 살았다. 그는 1779년 7월 26일 미국 버지니아 주 함프실르 오구스타에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Alexander Hughes Sr nasceu aproximadamente 1697, em Filadélfia, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, seu pai, Charles Hughes, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Electa Rebecca Judson, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Christina Nilsdötter Jonasson aproximadamente 1729, em Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Augusta, Virginia, British Colonial America em 1745. Ele faleceu em 26 de julho de 1779, em Augusta, Hampshire, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, com 83 anos.

ru.Radnor Township, Delaware, Pennsylvania,: раднор тоуншип, делавар, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Francis Alexander Hughes Sr родился около 1697 г. в местности филаделфя, филаделфя, Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Charles Hughes было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Electa Rebecca Judson, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Christina Nilsdötter Jonasson около 1729 г. в местности Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности аугуста, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1745 году. Он умер 26 июля 1779 г. в местности аугуста, хампшир, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Francis Alexander Hughes Sr nació aproximadamente 1697, en Filadelfia, Philadelphia, Pensilvania, British Colonial America, su papá, Charles Hughes, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Electa Rebecca Judson, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Christina Nilsdötter Jonasson aproximadamente 1729, en Pensilvania, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Augusta, Virginia, British Colonial America en 1745. Murió el 26 de julio de 1779, en Augusta, Hampshire, Virginia, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 83 años.
